title: Ridza Tsuri
Petyo Kana Nepam’suvo
Usu Neusu
Arikuuya
Kure Senyi Kumusha?
lyrics:
A kurekure kumusha?
Ndabvunza murindi, ati,
Usiku hurikupera,
Kwakuda kuyedza.
Usacheme, kurumidza,
Mutewere, kusimbira;
Muchasvika mukupenya
Hakuna kupera.

Ndabvunza kune mukani,
Anerwiyo rwekushinga,
Ngekushinga ndinokana,
Hondo ichapera.
Musacheme, mutiwire,
Dakara basa rapera,
Tinoziva tinechipo,
Kuti takurira

Ndabvunzazve pasi, zuva,
Zvese zvakandipindura;
Nguva irikundopera,
Jesu anouya.
Musacheme, zviwoniso zve
Zviri kutinyewera,
Zvisikwa zvese zvinoda
Tsuri imborira.

Tiripatyo nekumusha,
Kunofadza kutondera
Chifarai imwi vafambi,
Bvisanyi’wo kutya.
Musacheme, tisangane
Apo kusina kuneta,
Zviyedzo’zvo zvakapera,
Tasvika kumusha

title: Jesu Arikuuya
lyrics:
Rindanyi’mwi vanoyera,
Zvioneso zvaonekwa
Mwenje yenyu batidzanyi,
Munochingamidza Tenzi

Chorus:
Wonanyi, anouya;
Jesu Mambo anouya,
Anouya kuzotonga,
Wonanyi, anouya.

Wonanyi chitsidzo chake,
Chekuti musunungurwe
Nguwo chena nezviremba,
Kasikanyi kutaura.

Atigadzirira nzvimbo,
Muumambo hwake iyo;
Tauranyizve zvemutsa,
Tsuri isati yaridzwa

Vanyangadzi uyai zvino,
Kristu anotinunura;
Kasika ichipo nguva,
Kristu anoda kuuya.

title: Apo Jesu Anouya
lyrics:
Apo Jesu anouya kugashira vake;
Vanhu vake vakanaka, Vanodikanwa.

Chorus:
Senyenyedzi kudenga, Vese vachapenya;
Vachagara naJesu, Wake, kumusha

Vachaunganidza vana veumambo hwake:
Vatereri vakanaka, Vanodikanwa

Vana vese vanodisa Muponesi wavo
Varivake vanokosha, Vanodikanwa

title: Mazita Anodaidzwa
lyrics:
Kuti Tenzi anoridza tsuri yekuguma ’Iyo,
Apo nguva yepasi yapera’wo;
Kuti vakanaka vese vanounganidzwa’po
Mazita anodaidzwa, ndiripo.

Chorus:
Mazita anodaidzwa (3 times)
Anodaidzwa kudenga, ndiripo

Pamusi’wo vanomuka vakafa kuna Kristu,
Vanoona mbiri huru yake’yo
Apo vasarudzwi vanosangana kumusha’ko,
Mazita anodaidzwa ndiripo

Ngatibate basa rake kuti rinozopera;
Ngatishumaire rudo rwaMwari
Ndizvo Jesu anouya kutora vanhu vake,
Mazita anodaidzwa ndiripo

title: Jesu Unouya-Zve!
Kusangana Kurwizi
lyrics:
Tichasangana kurwizi,
Apo kune kupenya;
Mvura yakanakisisa
Yabva kuna Jehova.

Chorus:
Hunde tosangana iyo,
Parwizi rwakanaka kudenga
Tosangana nevanoyera
Pachigaro chaMwari

Iyo pagombe perwizi,
Rwakabvira kuchena
Tichafamba nekutenda,
Nguva dzese tofara

Kurwizi’rwo runopenya,
Mitoro ticharasa;
Tosunungurwa ngemutsa,
Togashira chiremba

Tosvika nekukasika,
Nerwendo ruchapera;
Mwoyo yedu ichafara,
Ngerwiyo rwekutenda

title: Ndokutewera M’ponesi,
lyrics:
Ndokutewera M’ponesi, Kwese’ko ndinogara
Apo imwi munoenda, Hunde ndokutewera

Chorus:
Ndokutewera M’ponesi, Imwi makandifira
Kana vese vakusiya, Ini ndokutewera

Kana nzira inoshata, Kana kusina nzira
Mwaenda pamberi pangu, Ini ndokutewera

Kuti ndaona dambudzo, Zvimwe ini ndaedzwa
Imwizve mwakamboedzwa, Ini ndokutewera

Kana ndawane urombo, Kushaya, kusafara
Ndatondera mwakashaya, Tenzi, ndokutewera

Kuti ndinoona rufu, Musatizve mwauya
Mwakafa, makamboigwa, Ndichiri kutewera

title: Iripo Tsime
lyrics:
Iripo tsime izere Neropa raJesu;
Vanyangadzi vasamba’mo, Vanochena naro

Mbavha yokufa yafara Kuona tsime’yo
Kana ini munyangadzi, Ndinochena nayo

Nyenye yaMwari, ropaIro, Harishaye simba
Dakara vanhu vaJesu, Vese vaponeswa

Tenzi ndinodawirazve, Kana ndakatadza
Vandigadzirira chipo, Chawanwa ngeropa

Nekudenga ndichaimba, Ngesimba nerudo
Kuti ngeropa raJesu, Ndaponeswa naro

title: Kuchena Kwazvo
lyrics:
O Jesu ndinoda kurapwa kwazvo
Ndinoda imwi mugare mumoyo
Bvisa zvakaipa, dzinga mhandu’yo
Mundisambe ndichachena kwazvo

Chorus:
Ndichachena, ndichene kwazvo
Mundisambidze, ndichachena kwazvo

O Jesu, kudenga nangisa pasi
Mundibatsire ndinopira zvese
Ndinozvipa ini zvese ndinazvo
Mundisambidze, ndichachena kwazvo

Jesu, ndikukumbire nekupfava
Pamakumbo ako, Tenzi ndamira
Ndachena ngeropa nge kudawira
Mundisambidze ndichachena kwazvo

Jesu, ndarindira nekutiwira
Uyo mundipinze nemoyo mutsva
Haurambe vese vakutsvaka’vo
Mundisambidze, ndichachena kwazvo

title: Inzwai Mapeni’wo
Jesu Anondidisa
lyrics:
Jesu wandidisa’ni,
Randiudza Bhaibheri;
Vana vanomudisa,
Muponesi wavada

Chorus:
Jesu wandida, Jesu wandida
Jesu wandida, Bhuku randiudza

Jesu wakandifira,
Wakasiya’ro denga
Wakauya pasizve,
Kuponesa’vo vese

Jesu wandidisa’ni,
Ndine urombo ini;
Wakazarurira’wo,
Nzira yekudenga’ro

Jesu wandidisa’ni,
Uripetyo’zve neni;
Kuti ndikamuda’ye,
Unozonditorazve

title: Chengetai Tukumbo
lyrics:
Nhasi maoko angu,
Ndasamba’wo kwazvo
Ndaapa kuna Jesu,
Kuita basa’ro

Chorus:
Chengetai tukumbo, Apo twafamba;
Zviro’zvo zvaJesu, Basi ndinoda

Nzeve dzangu ndaudza,
Kuterera kunzwa
Zvebasa’ro remutsa,
Zvondingabatsira

Maziso anangisa,
Zvemaoko angu
Arege kunyangadza,
Pam’sana paJesu

title: Rudo Runotifadza
lyrics:
Rudo runotifadza, Runonatsa nzira
Runoita titeerere, Nekuva nemutsa

Chorus:
Mwari rudo, Tirivana vake, Mwari rudo
Tifanane na’Ye. Rudo runotifadza, Runonatsa
nzira, Runoita titeerere, Nekuva nemutsa

Pasi rine urombo, Kurwara nekufa;
Ngerudo tinobatsira, Vamwe kudawira

Apo basa rapera, Tatorwa kum’soro,
Ngoma yedu tichaimba, NdiJesu nge-rudo

title: Fambanyi MaKristu
lyrics:
Ngatifambe tese mubasa iri,
Muchinjiko wake uri pamberi;
Kristu Tenzi wedu uri pamberi,
Pamberi mubasa ngatifambenyi.

Chorus:
Fambanyi maKristu mubasa iri
M’chinjiko waJesu uri pamberi

Chita cha Satani chichakurirwa
Fambanyi pamberi, tine mabasa
Ngerwiyo’rwo rwedu Jesu akudzwa
Ngatiite basa, tinoripedza

Sangano raMwari sehondo huru
Rinoenda mberi pamwe naJesu
Hatipatsaniswe, tese ngerudo
Rusimbiro rumwe nerudzidziso

Umambo hwepasi huchazoputswa
Asi sangano’ro riri kukura
Zano raSatani richakurirwa
Chitsidzo chaKristu chinozogara

Ndizvo imwi vanhu, pamberi kwazvo
Ngatiimbe tese rwerukuriro
Mbiri nerukudzo rwaKristu Mambo
Vanhu nengirozi dzichaimba’yo

title: Iwa Kumurindi Wako
lyrics:
Mwoyo wangu rinda, Mhandu dziri zhinji
Dzinoda kubvisa imwi, Munzira yaMwari

Rinda, munamate, Musatize hondo,
Itanyi mazuva ese, Jesu ari petyo

Reganyi kufunga, Kuti makurira,
Dakara Jesu auye, Kuzotitambira

title: Muka Moyo Wangu
lyrics:
Izwi resimba raMwari,
Rinokudaidzai,
Anovapa zvipo zvavo,
Kune vanodisa

Mbovo zhinji dziri petyo,
Dzirikunangisa,
Siya nzira’yo yekare,
Muende kudenga

Muponesi matiisa,
Munzira kumusha,
Kuti apo takwirira,
Tinozokutenda

title: Ndouya Kumuchinjiko
lyrics:
Ndouya kumchinjiko,
Upofu neurombo
Handidi chimwe chiro,
Asi ruponeso’rwo

Chorus:
Ndosimbira kunemwi, Nyenye yepaCalvary,
Ndinopfugama pasi, Mundiponese ini

Jesu ndokuchemera,
Moyo wangu waipa,
Jesu’ye wataura,
Ndinozo-kuchenura

Ndapa zvese kunemwi,
Zviro zvese zvepasi
Moyozve nemuviri,
Uve wenyu narini

Ndosimbira kunemwi,
Mune zvitsidzo zvenyu
Zvino ndarapwa ini,
Neropa’ro raKristu

Jesu arikuuya,
Moyo wangu wazara,
Zvino ndakachenurwa,
Mbiri kuna Jehova

title: Kuneni
lyrics:
Ndanzwa ngezvikomborero,
Murikuvapa Tenzi,
Vamwe varikugashira,
Madonhwe mundipenyi

Chorus:
Kuneni, Kuneni,
Madonhwe mundipenyi

Musandipfuura Baba,
Kana ndashata ini,
Tenzi, musazondisiya,
Mutsa wenyu ndipenyi

Ndanga ndiri muchitema,
Ndine urombo ini
Moyo wabatwangepasi,
Mundisunungurenyi

Mudzimu musapfuure,
Mapofu murapenyi,
Ita umboyo waJesu,
Runyararo ndipenyi

title: Ndizadze Zvino
lyrics:
Uyayi Mudzimu Mutsvene,
Zadzanyi moyo wangu,
Uyanyi’wo zvino pano,
Zadzanyi moyo wangu

Chorus:
Uyanyi, zadzanyi, Jesu nemutsa wenyu,
Uyanyi’wo zvino pano, Zadzanyi moyo wangu

Munokwanisa kuzadza,
Moyo wese’wo wangu
Asi ndinokuda Imwi,
Kuzadza moyo wangu

Ndaneta handine simba,
Ndinopfugama kwenyu
Mudzimu usingaperi,
Zadzanyi moyo wangu

Uyanyi mundichenure,
Nyaradza moyo wangu
Zvino murikuita’wo,
Kuzadza moyo wangu

title: Ndinokushaya Nguva
lyrics:
Ndichiri kushaya, Tenzi wangu,
Hakuna izwizve kunga renyu

Chorus:
Ndoshaya nekushaya, Tenzi ndokushaya,
Zvino mundikomborere, Ndinouya

Ndichiri kushaya, Garai petyo,
Handiputswi apo muripano

Ndichiri kushaya, Mudambudzo,
Kana ndikushaya, Murufaro

Ndichiri kushaya, Ndikudisa,
Nezvitsidzo zvenyu munondipa

Ndichiri kushaya, Munoera,
Ndinova wenyu’di, Mwakanaka

title: Ndazvipira Zvese
lyrics:
Zvese, Jesu, ndazvipira,
KwaMuponesi wangu,
Ndosimbira nekumuda,
O, chengeta upenyu

Chorus:
Zvese ndikupa, Zvese ndikupa,
Zvese kuna Muponesi, Zvese ndikupa

Zvese, Jesu, ndazvipira,
Tenzi pamberi penyu,
Ndarega pfuma dzepasi,
Mundigashire Jesu

Zvese, Jesu, ndazvipira,
Ndinofanana nemwi,
Ndizadzenyi Mweya wenyu,
Muri wangu M’ponesi

Zvese, Jesu, ndazvipira,
Ndanzwa moto mutsvene,
O, rufaro rweupenyu.
Mbiri, Mbiri kunemwi

title: Sezvo Ndiri
lyrics:
Sezvo ndiri, asi Jesu,
Pam'chinjiko wandifira,
Nekuti wandidaidza,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, handiyedzi,
Moyo wangu kuchenesa,
Asi munondiyeresa,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, ndatambudzwa,
Nekutya nekupokana,
Zvepasi zvinondiyedza,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, ndinoshaya,
Ndine hurombo, hwebofu,
Asi zvese munondipa,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, ndinouya,
Kuti mundisunungure
Ngekuti ndinodawira,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, rudo rwako,
Rwandikurira mumoyo,
Ndiri wako wega zvino,
Nyenye yaMwari ndauya

title: Mutimutse Zve
lyrics:
Tinokukudza, Imwi Mwari wedu,
NdiJesu wakauya kufira isu

Chorus:
Hareruya, Kudza Mwari, Hareruya, Amen,
Hareruya, Kudza Mwari, Mutimutsezve

Tinokukudza, Imwi Mwari wedu,
Wakatipa rujeko, ndi’ye Mudzimu

Mbiri, kukudza, kweNyenye yaMwari,
Wakatiponesa mune zvitadzozve

Mbiri, rukudzo, kunemwi wemutsa,
Wakatitsvaka nokutitungamira

Mutimutsezve, ngerudo izare,
Moyo yese ipfutwe ngemoto m’tsvene

title: Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa
lyrics:
Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa,
Taura naTenzi, Munozogutswa,
Ngeizwi’ro rake Uzadze moyo,
Tsvaka kuna Iye Chikomborero

Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa,
Iwanyi nenguva naJesu ega,
Nekumunangisa, Mufane na’Ye,
Vese vachaona Jesu kunewe

Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa,
Musaenda mberi, asi teverai,
Jesu Muponesi, Anotungamira,
Ndizvo muBhaibheri, Munosimbira

Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa,
Zvese’zvo zvifungo Zvamunoita,
Zvinotungamirwa NdiJesu Kristu,
Zve munogadzirwa Humambo hwedu

title: Garai Neni
lyrics:
Garai neni usiku hwasvika,
Tenzi garai neni kune dima,
Vanditiza vamwe vabatsiri,
Mubatsiri wedu, garai neni

Upenyu hwachimbidza kuguma,
Kufara kwepasi kunopera,
Zvasakara kwazvo zviro zvese,
Usingasakari, garai neni

Ndinomuda Imwi nguva dzese,
Mutsa unokurira muyedzi
Mudonzvo wangu, Mutungamiri,
Mudima, pachena garai neni

Imwi muripo, handityi mhandu,
Handine kuremerwa mushungu
Kufa, guva, kukunda kuripi?
Ndinokurira ugere neni

Misa muchinjiko ndotandadza,
Penya, undinongedze kudenga,
Kwayedza kwazvo, yabva mimvuri,
Mupenyu, mukufa, garai neni

title: Zuva Ririkudoka
lyrics:
Zuva riri kudoka,
Pasi rinozorora,
Namata nekutenda,
Usiku hunouya

Chorus:
Yera, Yera, Yera, Tenzi Mwari,
Denga rese nepasi,Zvese zvazara ndimwi,
Tenzi Mwari

Tenzi weupenyu’wo,
We zvese pasi pano,
Mutiunganidze’su,
Mumaoko’wo enyu, Muri pedyo

Apo dima rasviba,
Werudo tichengete,
Moyo yedu ikwire,
Pamberi penyenyedzi, Apo muri

Kuti apo nguva’yo,
Inopera pasi’ko,
Tenzi matibvumira,
Tichapinda kumusha, Wekudenga

title: Zuva Remoyo Wangu
lyrics:
Zuva rangu, Muponesi,
Kunopenya apo muri
Murambidze zvakaipa,
Zvinozondidzikatira

Apo hope dzandibata,
Maziso angu apfigwa
Ndotondera kuchanaka,
Kuna Jesu kuzorora

Garai neni zuva rese,
Ndichengete nguva dzese,
Garai neni pausiku,
Kanazve murufu rwangu

Ndikomborere ndomuka,
Ndisati ndaenda m’basa,
Ndichanaka nepanzira,
Dakara ndisvike denga

title: Chidziwiro Munguva Yechampupuri
lyrics:
Tenzi ari Dombo redu,
Nechidziwiriro chedu,
Tisatye muzviro zvese,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

Chorus:
Nge-Dombo rinemasimba,
Ngebvute, apo taneta;
Ngewedu kutungamira,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

Bvute redu masikati,
Nechidziwiriro chedu,
Nekupenya pausiku,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

Champupuri chatinera,
Nechidziwiriro chedu,
Kuna Mwari taponeswa,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

O Mwari, Bako redu’wo,
Nechidziwiriro chedu,
Mubatsiri muripetyo,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

title: Iye Anonditungamira
lyrics:
Wanditungamira Jesu,
Ngemazwi ake emutsa
Zvese’zvo ndinozoita,
Iye anotungamira

Chorus:
Iye anditungamira, Ngeruoko wandibata,
Ini ndinomutevera, Kuti anotungamira

Kana ndabatwa nenhamo,
Zvimwe ndichafara kwazvo,
Nerunyararo, dambudzo,
Anova nerubatsiro

Tenzi, ndibate ngesimba,
Ndizvo handigurugute,
Kwese ndiri ndichafara,
Mwari anotungamira

Kuti basa razopera,
Zvese newe ndakurira,
Kana rufu handizotyi,
Kuti Mwari achineni

title: Kwanaka Nemoyo Wangu
lyrics:
Apo runyararo runondifadza,
Kana urombo ndinahwo,
Kana muzvese, makandidzidzisa,
Kunaka nemoyo wangu’wo

Chorus:
Kwanaka . . . nemoyo, . . .
Kwanaka nemoyo wangu’wo

Kana Satani anonditambudza,
Ndichasimbira kunemwi,
Jesu anoziva kwangu kushaya,
Wakandifira’po pamuti

Ndinofara ngekutondera kuti,
Zvitema zvangu zvese’zvo,
Zvapera pamuchinjiko, zvapera,
Ndatenda nemoyo, Jesu’yo

Kurumidzanyi musi wenyu Tenzi,
Makore achazopetwa,
Tsuri inorira, Tenzi odzika,
Zvadaro, nemoyo, kwanaka

title: Kutsamira Mumaoko Asingagumi
lyrics:
Tine ukama, tine kufara,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake,
Chikomborero, runyararo’wo,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake

Chorus:
Kutsamira, Mumaoko’iwo aJesu,
Kutsamira, Mumaoko ake aJesu

Kunotapira kufamba m’nzira,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake,
Nzira yapenya, zuva nezuva,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake

Chinyi ndinotya, nekutizira?
Kutsamira m’maoko ake,
Ngerunyararo, Tenzi wapedyo,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake

title: Ndinonangisa Kunemwi
lyrics:
Ndinokunangisa, nekuzodaira, Muponesi,
Chinzwai, ndonamata, mubvise zvitema,
O, mundiregere ndive wenyu

Ngemutsa mundipe moyo ungasimbe, Ndishingise
Makandifira’wo, zve ndive nerudo,
Runoyera sezvo moto m'tsvene

Kana kune dima, kana ndatambudzwa, Mundibate,
Dima mungadzinge, pukuta masodzi,
Musandibvumire ndirasike

title: Pedyo Kunemwi, Mwari Wangu
lyrics:
Pedyo nemwi, Mwari, pedyo nemwi,
Kana ne dambudzo, riri neni,
Ndichiri kuimba, pedyo nemwi Mwari,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

Ndafanane M’fambi, wadokerwa,
Dima randibata ndi'munzira,
Mukurota ini,ndiri pedyo nemwi,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

Nzira yaonekwa yekudenga,
Munditungamire, kuchengeta,
Dzasheedza ngirozi, pedyo nemwi Mwari,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

Ndizvo pakumuka, ndikutenda,
Kubva mudambudzo ndakukudza,
Muurombo ini ndiri pedyo Mwari,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

Zvepamwe naJesu, Ndingakwira,
Pamberi pezuva, kune denga
Pakuimba ndiri pedyo nemwi Mwari,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

title: Mira Padombo
lyrics:
Miriranyi’wo kuna Jehova,
Mukutambudzwa zvemuurombo,
IDombo rega rinopa simba,
Muyedzi ari pedyo

Chorus:
Miranyi paDombo, simbiranyi apo,
Dombo ndiKristu ega,
Kuti takurira tichazomira,
Nechita chichaponeswa

Miriranyi mese kururama,
Moyo ushinge nerudawiro
IDombo rega rinokurira,
Zvitema zvepasi’po

Miranyi mese muidi’ro,
Kana ranonoka richakura,
IDombo rega rinotipa’wo
Kuzorora kudenga

title: Dombo Rine Simba
lyrics:
Rukariro urwo rwangu,
Rusimbire kuna Kristu,
Handidawiri nemunhu,
Asi muzita raJesu

Chorus:
Ndinomira kuna Jesu,
Ndiye Dombo, nheyo yangu,
Zvimwe ndichanyura zvangu

Kuti avigwa ngedima,
Tsitsi dzake ndogarira
Mumhepo huru yesimba,
Ruoko rwake ndobata

Chirangano chake icho,
Nechitsidzo cheropa’ro,
Zvinondipa rusimbiro,
Pakati pematambudzo

Apo anenge ouya,
Netsuri ichazoridzwa,
Ndinoda kuti ndimire,
NaJesu parudyi rwake

title: Kusimbira Nekuteerera
lyrics:
Apo tinofamba muinzwi raBaba
Imbiranyi toona m’nzira
Kuti tinomuda, nesu anogara
Nevese vanomuteerera

Chorus:
Kuteerera, Ndiyo basi nzira,
Kufara kuna Jesu, Basi kuteerera

Hakuna urombo hunotitambudza,
Asi Jesu anohudzinga,
Kana kupokana, masodzi nekutya
Hazvigari nekusimbira

Hakuna mutoro, hakuna urombo,
Asi anotidzokesera,
Hakuna kushaya, kana kutambudzwa,
Tinowana nekusimbira

Asi hatione kufara kwerudo,
Dakara zvese tinomupa,

Hakutibatsiri kunzwa kwedu mitemo nezvitsidzo;
Kuzvinzwa, kuzviita hakuponesi; Vakomborerwa vanoita.

Vanozopinda mumusha vakasunungurwa zviitema
Vasukwa, nembiri, zvino narini, Vanodya muti veupenyu.

title: Hakuna Mumwe
lyrics:
Hakuna hama kupinda Jesu, Hakuna, neimwe!
Hakuna umwe kurapa vese, Hakuna, neumwe!

Chorus:
Anoziva nanhamo Jesu, Anotungamira tese,
Hakuna umwe kupinda Jesu, Hakuna!neumwe.

Hakuna umwe mukuruzveba, Hakuna ne-umwe!
Asi Anozviita muduku, Hakuna neumwe!>

Hakuna nguva asipo Iye, Hakuna neimwe:
Kana usiku rudo ruripo, Hakuna neimwe.

Hakuna umwe akamborambwa, Hakuna neimwe! neumwe!
Kana munyangadzi ha’murambi, Hakuna!neumwe!

Hakuna chipo chikuruzveba, Hakuna nechimwe!
Hangatinyimi musha kudenga, Hakuna neumwe!

title: Upenyu Mukutarisa
lyrics:
Pamuchinjiko pane upenyu, Jesu Ati, "Nditarise."
Pasi nepfuma ngezvenhando, Pamberi ndoona zvakanaka.

Chorus:
Mune u-penyu muku-tarisa muchinjiko.
(Upenyu m’kutarisa pam’chinjiko vaKristu,)
Upenyu hwakanaka kutarisa Kalvari
(Upenyu hwakanaka tarisa paKalvari, pakalvari.)

Apo ndakamutarisa Jesu, Iye Akanyemwerera,
Kuti ndava mumatambudzo, Muchinjiko unondisimbisa.

Ndinozotarisa muchinjiko, Ndosimbira muchinjiko;
Hakuna anozoputsika Vanosimbira simba redenga.

title: Achidaidza
lyrics:
Jesu arikudanira kumusha, kudana iwe neni,
Arindira pamusiwo nemwoyo, Rindira iwe neni.

Chorus:
Uya kum’sha, Imi maneta uya.
(Uya) (Kum’sha)
Jesu arikumudaidza kwazvo, O munyangadzi uya

Musanonoke achimudaidza Kunyengerera imwi,
Ngenyiko tisinganzwi mutsa wake, Mutsa kunewe Nemi.

Nguwa irikukasika kupfu’ra Kupfu’ra iwe neni,
Bvute, nedima, rufaro zvouya Uya kunewe neni

Funga ngerudo akatitsidzira Tsidzira iwe neni
Kana takatadza \‘nosunungura, Osunungura tese.

title: Zambara Razarurirwa Ini
lyrics:
Zambara rakazarurwa Kuti ini ndipinde;
Muchinjiko waM’ponesi Tichauona apo.

Chorus:
Mutsa wakadzama kwazvo kuti andizarurire,
Ini...ini...Rasiyirwa ini.
(Ini) (ini.)

Zambara rakazarurwa Kuti vese vapone.
Vapfumi kana varombo, madzinza kana ndudzi.

Pamberi ngatifambenyi, richakandozarurwa,
Gashiranyi rudo Rwake, Chiremba nem’chinjiko.

Hunde mhiriyo kwerwizi Totura muchinjiko
Totakura ‘cho-chiremba Toda Mwari kudenga.

title: Murapi Mukuru
lyrics:
Murapi m’kuru uripo we mutsa, ndiye Jesu.
Anofarisa warombo, Inzwai izvi raJesu.

Chorus:
Zita Rake ritendzwe, Zita rake rikudzwe
Zita Rake riimbwe; Jesu hunde Jesu

"Zwitadzo zwa sunungurwa" Inzwai izwi raJesu.
Fambanyi naYe kudenga, Tigere’ko naJesu.

Mbiri kuNyenye yaMwari, Ndinodawira Jesu,
Ndinodisa zita iri raMuponesi Jesu.

Zwimwe ndatadza ndinoda Kunzwa zita ra Jesu,
Mwoyo wangu wanyaradzwa Ngezita’ro ra Jesu.

Apo iye achauya nembiri ne upenyu,
Tichafara kutaura ruponeso rwaJesu.

title: Hamuna Nzvimbo YaJesu
lyrics:
Uzerea ne kunetswa, Ha’na nzwimbo ya Jesu?
Wabatwa nemirau, Ha’na nzwimbo ya Jesu?
O, Amire pamusiwo, O gugudza-gugudza!
Munzwe onyengerera Ha’na nzwimbo ya Jesu?

Unopambadza nguwa, Hana basa ra Jesu?
Usapambadza Simba, Ha’na basa raJesu?
Hauyedzi kukunda, Kana kuwana Mweya;
Daidza warasika; Ha’na basa raJesu?

Unotswaka upfumi, Ha’na nguva ya Jesu?
Usinga bati basa, Ha’na nguva ya Jesu?
Rufaro ne upfumi, Ndizvo zviro unoda,
Kuyedza kuzvifadza; Ha’na nguva ya Jesu?

Watakura zvenhando, Ha’na m’chero va Jesu?
Haunaba misumbu, Ha’na m’chero va Jesu?
Hauna kana chiro, kuripa basa rako;
Hauwani rufaro, Wokumbana na Jesu?

title: Ndirikuuya Tenzi
lyrics:
Ndanzwa izwi renyu, Randidana Tenzi;
Ndigeze neropa renyu, RepaKalvari,

Chorus:
Ndouya Tenzi! Uya kunemwi;
Ndigezei neropa, RepaKalvari.

Handina masimba, Munondisimbisa;
Mondigezisa ndichene, Ndichene sechero,

Jesu ondidaidza, kune runyararo,
Kurudo nerusimbiro, rwepasi nedenga.

Rukudzo muropa, Kudzai tsitsi dzake,
Kudzai Chipo cha Tenzi, Arisimba Redu.

title: Jesu Akaripa Zwese
lyrics:
Muponesi ati, "Hauna masimba,"
Rinda unamate, Ndinokupa zvese.

Chorus:
Jesu M’nunuri, zvese ngezwake,
Zvitema zvakatsvuka "zwachena Sechero"

Tenzi ndazoona Munesimba rese,
Munobvisa hosha ne mwoyo we dombo.

Handina kunaka kungadiwa tsitsi,
Nguwo ya-ngu ndogeza muropa renyenye.

Pachigaro chenyu ndichamiranemi,
Ndicha isa zwese pamakumbo Ake.

title: Nanda Rinochenisa
Ndinodayira
lyrics:
Baba ndouya kwamuri; Hakuna umwezwe!
Kuti mandisiya ndeda; O ndinoendepi.

Chorus:
Ndodaira iye zvino, Jesu wandifira,
Ropa Rake raparara, kuchenesa ini.

Mwana wenyu ndom’daira, ndinzwe simba renyu,
Zvidiso zvangu zvazadzwa, mune ino nguva.

Muvambi verudairo, Ndotarisa imwi,
Ndogashira chipo chenyu; Ndiponeswe nacho.

title: Ndichaimba Ne Rudo RwaJesu
lyrics:
Ndicha i...mbira Jesu Iye wa...kandidisa
(Ndicha-i...) (Iye wa...)
Akari...siyadenga Akafa pa Kari-va-ri
(Akari...)

Chorus:
Ndoimba...rudo rwaJesu, Ndomuku...dzanarini
(Ndoimba...) (Ndomuku...)
Wakandi...fira ini Ndoimba rudo rwake
(Wakandi...)

Ndisati...ndachema Jesu aka...ndichemera
(Ndisati Suaka)
Ndisati...ndanamata Akandi namatira
(Ndisati)

Okudza...makwerudo Hakuzi...kanwikwese
(Okudza...) (Hakuzi...)
Kutizwi...tema zvangu Zvacheneswa sechero
(Kutizwi)

Handina...rudo rwaJesu Ndomuku...dza narini
(Handina) (koaka)
Tenzi mwo...yo waneta Ndizadzeyi nerudo
(Tenzimwo)

title: Petyo, Kune Mwi Tenzi
lyrics:
Petyo, Petyo, ne mwoyo venyu, Ndiswendedze imwi munokosha
Ndifungatireyi paditi, Ndiyige muninga, yezororo,
Ndiyige "Muninga, yezororo."

Petyo, Petyo, handina chiro chemupiro kuna Jesu mambo;
Chete mwoyo unechitema, Ndicheneseyi ne ropa renyu;
Ndicheneseyi ne ropa renyu.

Petyo, Petyo, zve kuva wenyu, Ndino siya zvese zvechitema
Rufaro rwacho, nekuzvida, Ndipenyi Jesu
Akarowerwa, Ndipenyi Jesu akarowerwa

Petyo, Petyo, ndichikupona, Dakara ndiswike m’mbiri
Yenyu, Ndinozowa wenyu narini,
Petyo Muponesi, petyo nemwi,Petyo Muponesi, petyo nemwi

title: Rita Rinoyera
lyrics:
Zita rakanakisisa, rinopfuura ese,
Rakapiwa naye Baba, Kumu Rubgwana Wake.

Chorus:
Iro rinoyera; Zita rinoyera
(Royera!)(Royera!)
Rabva kuna Baba, Ra’ya pasi
Rauya ne ngirosi; Ra’ya pausiku
(Royera) (Royera)
Zita ra Tenzi Jesu. Rounza chikomborero, Ndoimba ndichifara,
Zita Rake ndoribvuma, Ndichazoriparidza. Nyaya yerusununguro nerudo ndichaimba
Ndichazo rikudza zita rinopfuura ese.

title: Kwete Ini Asi Kristu
Kujeka Mumwoyo
lyrics:
Kune kupenya mugomo, nekupenya munyanza,
Nemaranzi anogara Munzwimbo dzakanaka,
Mukati memwoyo wangu mazadzwa nekujeka,
Apo pana Muponesi pano jekesa kwese.

Chorus:
O! kupenya kwakanaka kupenyera mu mwoyo,
Jesu ano bvisa nhamo anopenya mumwoyo.

Ndosiya kusuwa kwangu Senguwadzo dzekare;
Ndifukidze nekutenda mundipenyikutenda.
Kumusha wembiri uyo makandigadzirira;
Mwoyo wangu unotenda ne mweya unobvuma.

Muponesi manditenga ndawawenyu narini;
Ngayipfute mwenje yese ipfutire iye Tenzi.
Kumusha wembiri uyo makandigadzirira;
Mwoyo wangu uno tenda nemweya unobvuma.

title: Sezwo Ndaponeswa
lyrics:
Ndine ngoma yandinoda sezwo ndaponeswa;
Yamununuri naMambo Sezwo ndaponeswa.

Chorus:
Sezwo-ndaponeswa, Sezwo ndaponeswa
Ndokudza Muponesi, Sezwo ndaponeswa,
Ndokudza zita raM’ponesi

Ndina Kristu Oyerisa sezwo ndaponeswa.
Rudo rwake ndurudisa sezwo ndaponeswa. Ndine mbowo yakanaka sezwo ndaponeswa.
Anodzinga kutya kwese Sezwo ndaponeswa.

Andi gadzirira musha sezwo ndaponeswa,
Kwandicha gara narini sezwo ndaponeswa.

title: Anoda Zwe Ini
lyrics:
Mwari avona kashiri kaputsika pasi;
Kuti achida kashiri Anodazve ini.

Chorus:
Anondida, anondida, anondida ini,
Anoda zviduku zvese, anodazve ini.

Anogadzira maruva akanaka kwazvo;
Kuti anoda maruva anodazve ini.

Mwari wakasika zvese, shiri ne maruva,
Haachakanganwi tupwere, Twese anotuda.

title: Yakakomborerwa Nguwa Yemunamato
lyrics:
Chorus:
Nguwa yekunamata mwoyo uno pfawa
Touya kuna Jesu M’ponesi wedu
Nekutenda touya, Kuchishangu chedu
Orapa wakaneta, Zvakanaka kuwayo Mukunamata Tinokomborerwa
Orapa wakaneta Zvakanaka kuwayo.

Nguwa yekunamata, Tenzi oswedera
Ane tsitsi kunzwa vana vachichema
Zvese tinozviisa pamakumbo ake
Orapa wakaneta, Zvakanaka kuwayo

Nguwa yekunamata, apo vano yedzwa
Toisa kuna Tenzi anobatsira
Nemwoyo wekunzwira obvisa zvinetso
Orapa wakaneta, Zvakanaka kuwayo.

Panguwa yem’namato Tinomusimbira
Zwikomborero zwese tinozwiwana;
Mukusimbira iye hakuna dambudzo
Orapa wakaneta, Zvakanaka kuwayo.

title: Jesu Huya Utikomborere
lyrics:
Jesu imi mati "Pakaungana, Wawiri, watatu, munozowapo"
Tinomudaira, Tomunamata; Jesu uyai muzotikomborera.

Chorus:
Jesu u-ya uzo tikombo-rere Je-su kombo-rera, Ugare petyo.

Je-su makasangana nesu kare Asi iwa ne-su nekumagumo
Uya Muponesi, mutipe tsitsi; Tenzi tigashire; tino namata.

Ita mazwi edu amuimbire Inzwa zvikumbiro zvedu kunemwi;
Simbisa rudairo rwedu kunemwi, Chenesai rudo nzira ijeke.

title: ’Ndiri Wenyu Tenzi’
lyrics:
Ndiri wenyu Tenzi, Ndanzwa Izwi, Rataura nerudo,
Ndinoda kusimba murudairo. Ndiwe petyo nemwi.

Chorus:
Ndipfuwe-nyi Petyo naTenzi: (Pe-tyo pe-tyo)
Petyo nemuchinjiko. Ndipfuwenyi ndiwe
Petyo naTenzi, Petyo nedivi renyu.

Ndipirenyi kubasaro renyu, nesimbaro retsitsi
Mweya wangu utarise imwi, nerudo ruwe rwenyu.

Ndine rufaro Tenzi panguva ndiri-pamberi penyu,
Ndichipfugama nemwizve Mwari Tichitaurirana.

Kune rudo rwondisingazivi, Dakara ndiswikeko;
Rufaro rwo-ndisingasvikiri, Dakara ndiwe nemwi.

title: Ndifanane NaJesu
lyrics:
Ngandifane naJesu
Ave Mponesi wangu
Ndizadzenyi nerudo
Ndipfawire senjiwa
Ngandifambe saJesu
Murwendo rweripasi
Ndiri murombo m’mweyo
Garai neni Mponesi

Kana achinzwa shiri
Dzimwe dzichiputsika
Adzi itire mutsa
Ngeidi anondinzwa wo
Anonditungamirira
Nekundiregerera
Ngandi itwe mutswene
Garai neni M’ponesi

Ngandifane naJesu
Mukurarama kwangu
Ndizorore kunemwi
Panzwimbo inyerere
Ndibarwe patsva ini
Nerudo rwake Jesu
Ngandiwe nerutendo
Garai neni M’ponesi

title: Petyo Ne Muchinjiko
lyrics:
Petyo nemuchinjiko
Pane tsime kwaro
Mvura yekurapa
Yabva kuna Jesu

Chorus:
Petyo, Petyo nem’chinjiko wenyu
Ndipo panozorora
Mwoyo wangu wese

Petyo nemuchinjiko
Mutsa wandiwana
Apo ndajekeserwa
Kupenya kwaJesu

Petyo nemuchinjiko
Ndonuona Jesu
Ndibatsire kufamba
Mumabvute awo

Petyo nemuchinjiko
Ndorinda ndowimba
Dakara ndizoswika
Mhiriyo kwerizi

title: Kufamba NaMwari
lyrics:
O bvumai ndifambe nemwi
Sezvakaita Inoki
Mubate ruwoko rwangu
Nditaurirane nemwi
Kana nzira yoshayikwa
Ndibvumei ndifambe nemwi

Handingambo fambi ndega
Dutu ririkuvuvuta
Mirawu yakateiwa
Wawengi wanondi yedza
Ese aya matambudzo
Tenzi bvumai ndifambe nemi

Kuti mandipa zororo
Zvepasi zvinova nhando
Ndozofamba neku-shinga
Ndotakura muchinjiko
Dakara ndione Zioni
Tenzi bvumai ndifambe nemi

title: Rudo Runoshamisa Rwa Jesu
lyrics:
Panzwimbo yakakwirira
Mwoyo wangu unotenda
Ndiyani angatsanangura
Neurwu rudo rwaJesu

Chorus:
Rwoshamisa, Rwoshamisa, Ururudo rwaJesu
Runotishamisa isu, Ururudo rwaJesu

Rufaro pamasikati
Nerujeko panedima
Mushonga mudambudzo
Irwo rudo rwo rwaJesu

Tariro yesununguro
Mubatsiri ndaputsika
Muupenyu nemukufa
Ndirwo uru rudo rwaJesu

title: Ndinomuda Kwazvo
lyrics:
Ndinomuda kwazvo
Tenzi kune zviro zvese
Makandipa runyararo
Rusingaparadzwi

Chorus:
Hazvisati zvataurwa, Zverudo rukuru
Hazvisati zvataurwa, Ropa racheniswa

Ndinoziva muripetyo
Kunepasi rino
Ndofunga imwi chete
Kune ipi ngoma

Imwi mandisunungura
Ngandifarisise
Ndisinaba rudo rwenyu
Ini ndinga tsamwa

Tenzi wangu anokosha
Ndomuitirenyi
Kuti nzira yakanaka
Ndozofamba nemwi

title: Ndotondera Kalvari
lyrics:
Ndomutewera kweseko
Ndadzidza kumusimbira
Ndotondera kundifira
Pam’chinjiko we Kalvari

Chorus:
Jesu anditungamira, M’rwendo rwese
Nguva dzese, Ari shamwari yeidi
Ndinotondera Kalvari

Ndofarira m’temo wake
Ndoda anditungamire
Rudo rwake rwakanaka
Rwayerera paKalvari

Ndinofamba ndisingatyi
Ndofara naKristu petyo
Ndosimbira ndichaona
Shamwari ye paKalvari

title: Tora Hako Pasi
lyrics:
Ungatore hako pasi
Nerufaro rwaro rwese
Asi ndipe hangu Jesu
Anogara narini

Chorus:
Tsitsi dzake dzakadzama, Nerudorwo rukuru
Rununuro rwakakomba, Chitsidzo che upenyu

Ungatora hako pasi
Undipe hangu Jesu
Anondi nyaradza mweya
Naya ndinozoimba

Ungatora hako pasi
Undipe hangu Jesu
Ndione kufara kwake
Kondifadza munzira

Ungatora hako pasi
Undipe hangu Jesu
Ndinosimbira m’chinjiko
Dakara ndimuone

title: Kuzvipira Kuna Jesu
lyrics:
Tora upenyu hwangu
Huzvipire kunemwi
Tora mawoko angu
Ayite rudo rwako

Chorus:
Ndisambe ngeropa reNyenye
Ndasambwa, ndachena sechero
Tenzi ndomupa upenyu nezvese
Ndiwe wenyu narini

Tora makumbo angu
Amuitore basa
Tora izwi ndiimbe
Kunemwi nguva dzose

Tora muromo wangu
Uta’re soko renyu
Tora upfumi hwangu
Ndisasare nechiro

Tora nguva dzangu
Dzimukudze narini
Toranyi pfungwa dzangu
Mudziitise basa

Tora zvidiso zvangu
Zviite zviwe zvenyu
Toranyi mwoyo wangu
Uwe chigaro chenyu

Toranyi rudo rwangu
Tenzi ndinozvi pira
Tora huini hwangu
Huwe hwenyu narini

title: Ndawana Shamwari
lyrics:
Ndawana shamwari
Yakandida ndisingazivi
Akandipfuwa nerudo
Akandisunga kwa’ri
Mwoyo wangu wasungwa
Nepfundo-ro rakasimba
Jesu ndiri wako ini
Uriwangu narini

Ndawana shamwari
\‘Yoshamwari yakandifira
Handi upenyuba chete
Asi akazvipira
Zwe ndinazvo handizvangu
Ndakamuchengetera
Mwoyo, simba, upenyu zvese
Ngezvake narini

Ndawana shamwari
Akapiwa masimba ese
Kundichengeta munzira
Inoyenda kudenga
Mbiri iri kupenyayo
Kuti indisimbise
Ngandirinde ndisewenze
Pamberi ndozorora

Ndawana shamwari
Inemutsa idi nerudo
Ndimutungamiri kwaye
Anenzero nesimba
Kuna iye anondida
Ndinowana masimba
Korufo rungakurira?
Ndiri wenyu narini

title: Izwi Ra Jesu
lyrics:
Ndanzwa izwi
Jesu Ati Uya uzorore
Iwe waneta
Urarepo paditi pangu
Ndauya ndaneta
Ini Tenzi ndakasuwa
Ndawana zororo
Rino-fadza kuna iye

Ndanzwa izwi
Jesu Ati, Ona ndinokupa
Chimwa mvura yeupenyu Kuti urarame
Ndauya ndamwa kunaIye
Mvura yeupenyu
Nyota yapera ndapona
Kuna’ye M’ponesi

Ndanzwa izwi,
Jesu Ati, ndini mwenje wenyu
Nditarise kwakuyedza
Ndichakupenyera
Ndawona nyenyedzi
Nemwedzi kuna Jesu
Ndichafara mukujeka
Ndipedzise rwendo

title: Ndiri Wenyu
lyrics:
Ndinoda kuwawenyu
Tenzi ndidzidzisenyizve
Ndoita rudo rwenyu
Tenzi Ndibatsirenyi

Chorus:
Ndiriwe…nyu Tenzi,
Ngeidi ndiri wenyu
Ndinotsi…dza Tenzi,
Tenzi ndiri wenyu’di

Chinyi rufaro neupfumi
Imwi musipozve
Ndinosiya zvese zvepasi
Ndiwane zvenyu

Ndosiya rufaro rwenyika
Uyanyi kuneni
Ndinozoperera kunemwi
Mundinyaradze

title: Kunakayi!
lyrics:
Zuva rakanakisa Rakapinda ese
Totorasa pfungwa dzenyika
Tofunga naMwari

Mazwi erudo akanaka
Kubva kuna Iye
Ku’nza masodzi enhamo
Ot’svitsa kudenga

Kuti tidzinge zvitema
Tayedza tatadza
Iye anoona mwoyo
Anotibatsira

title: Tenzi Tipatsanisenyi Ne Chikomborero Chenyu
lyrics:
Tenzi tipatsanisenyi
Nechikomborero zve
Tipe rufaro nefaro
Tikurire netsitsi
Otipenyi masimbawo
Tichafamba mugwenga

Tomutenda nekukudza
Neinzwi revhangeri
Michero yeinzwi renyu
Izadze mwoyo yedu
Tivimbike nguva dzese
Tiwanikwe muidi

Achakavanda mazuva
Ngati ape kwa Muri
Ngatishinge misi yese
Titize tisanete
Kudakare tigoona
Mbiri yenyu kudenga

title: Panzwimbo yakakwirira
lyrics:
Ndiri kukwira munzira
Yekudenga misi yese
Ndichi namata munzira
Tenzi ndikwidzei kudenga

Chorus:
Ndisimudzenyi ndimiseyi,
Nerudawiro kudenga
Panzwimbo yakakwirira,
Tenzi ndimise kudenga

Handidi zvangu kugara
Apo pane kupokana
Asi vamwe vangagara
Tenzi ndimise kudenga

Ndoda kugara kudenga
Kana Satan’ Andinetsa
Rudairo rwangu rwese
Ngerwe kugara kudenga

Ndoda kukwira kum’soro
Ndione kupenya kwenyu
Ndino namatira kuti
Tenzi ndiise kum’soro

title: Usakumbire Kuregererwa
lyrics:
Usade kuregererwa kune basa
Mira usewenze, kwese ungaiswe
Kukona kwake kuri kupiwa iwe
Gashira uwane basa rekudenga

Chorus:
O huya… usawe senyope,O huya… mira
usewenze; Usade kuregererwa
Ungazonzwi achiti kunewe, hauchina basa

Usade kuregererwa, wadaidzwa
Chikasika iwe kuita basaro
Minda yatoibva vacheki vashoma
Farira kuita basa rake Tenzi

Usade kuregererwa
Kunengozi mukunonoka kuita basa rake
Uchinyengererwa neinzwi raTenzi
Jesu anemutsa uya uponeswe

title: Upenyu Hwenyu Kuneni
lyrics:
Pona mukati mangu
Jesu mamba wangu
Iwanyi mupinduro
Kumibvunzo yangu
Pona mukati mangu
Mutonge muzvese
Ini ndigopangidza

Muiri watopirwa
Usina chitema
Reganyi mbiri yenyu
Ipenye mukati
Pasi ngarinyarare
Muiri ugove
Muranda akativa
Anotumwa nemwi

Nenhengo dzavo dzese
Dziteerere \‘mwi
Dzagadzirira basa
Rabva kuna Tenzi
Dzorinda dzisingatyi
Kurwadza nekutya
Nekuzaridzwa neMwi
Nepfungwa dzenhando

Ndirinde nditerame
Ndisinga dzvongami

Mambo otonga narini, Ngaatonge narini
Hakun’ acham’patsanisa, Neawo makanemba
Zvisikwa zvetsitsi dzenyu, Zvamirira kum’ona
Hariruya! Hariruya! Hariruya! Amen

Kasikayi muponesi, Unzayi zuva renyu
Kuti mhere yozoridzwa, Pasi rinozopfu’ra
Tochiimba nemarimba, Mbiri kuna mambo wedu
Hariruya! Hariruya! Hariruya! Amen

title: Mumwe Achapinda Ne Mazambara
lyrics:
Mumw’ achapinda nezambara, Gare, gare, gare, gare
Kune mbiri yandamirira, Ndiwe here, Ndini here?
Mumwe \‘chafamba pandarama, Kune miono yakanaka
Todya rufaro rwataurwa, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?

Mumw’ achatura muchinjiko, Gare, gare, gare, gare
Vamwe vachapiwa ndarama, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?
Mumwe achazoona mambo, Matambudziko azopera
Ozofara naye narini, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?

Mumw’ achapfigirwa musiwo, Gare, gare, gare, gare
Inzvi roti handikuzivi, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?
Mumwe achadana, haanzvikwi, Otambura m’siwo wapfigwa
Mumwe oshaya mubairo, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?

Mumw’ anoimba rukuriro, Gare, gare, gare, gare
Tomukudza nevaponeswa, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?
Mumwe achazochingamidza, Vadiwa vepasi rapfuura
Tozova mumbiri narini, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?

title: Mazuva Opfuura
lyrics:
Kune mwoyo asurukirwa, mazuva opfuura
Kane mwoyo yakaneta, mazuva opfuura
Kana tichingafara, tiri murwendo rwedu
Tiite zvakanaka, mazuva opfuura

Chorus:
Opfu’ra, opfu’ra, opfu’ra, opfu’ra
Tiite zvakanaka, mazuva opfu’ra

Hakuchina kutukana, mazuva opfuura
Reg’ usu hwako hwupenye, mazuva opfuura
Pasi rineurombo, rizere nekuchema
Simudza vaputsika, mazuva opfuura

Mapfundo ese erudo, mazuva opfuura
Toasiya mumasure, mazuva opfuura
Mbeu’dzo tinodya, Dzinovamba kukura
Dzojekesa mumwoyo, mazuva opfuura

title: Kune Nzvimbo Yakanaka
lyrics:
Kune nzvimbo yakanaka, Petyo pana Baba
Nzvimbo isina chitema , Petyo kuna Baba

Chorus:
O Jesu Mununuri, makatuma pasi
Mutisvededze isu, petyo kuna Baba

Kune nzvimbo yerufaro, Petyo kuna Baba
Apo takumbana Naye, Petyo kuna Baba

Kune nzvimbo yezororo, Petyo kuna Baba
Nzvimbo iyo yerufaro, Petyo kuna Baba

title: O Nditakure
lyrics:
Ndoona rini’ko musi, Apo vaponeswa Vaswika Zioni
Musha werufaro kwazvo

Chorus:
O nditakure, nditakure, kuZioni
O chinditakura kuguta’ro revatsvene

O ndichanzva Hariruya, Rwoimbwa nechita
Nerufaro chichaimba, Rwiyo rwenunuro

Onayi mbiri yosvika, Iyo m’fambi anoda
Inonyaradza vachemi, Rufaro rwosvika

title: Mukuyedzwa Jesu
lyrics:
Mukuyedzwa, Jesu ndimirireyi
Tenzi kuti ini, ndisamusiye
Kuti ndotenheka, nditsiureyi
Musandibvumire, kuputsikazve

Pasi nerufaro, Rwakarambidzwa
Neupfumi hwaro, Zvisandi ku’adza
Mugonditondedza neGetsimani
Kana muchinjiko, weKarivari

Kana ’mi maunza, urombo, nhamo
Kana ndirwadziwe, munzira pasi
Bvumira ndione, r’woko rwenyu
Bvumirayi kuti ndimusimbire

title: Wakaunza Zvipo Kuna jesu
lyrics:
Vaunza kuna Jesu, zvipo zvavo zvese
Rudo kuna M’ponesi, Rwaita vamupe
Manzvi ese emutsa, kubatsira vamwe
Zvese-zvo zvipo zvavo akazvigashira

Chorus:
Waunza kuna Jesu, chipo chakanaka!
Ita, Ndamupa mwoyo, pamakumbo ako

Pakange pane m’fambi, ayidawo kupa
Akaonawo zvipo, zvo vaipa Tenzi
Ayidisa zvikuru kuti ape chipo
Akamirawo petyo asina nechiro

Achema ati, Tenzi ndimwi mune mutsa
Tora zvese, ndinazvo, nemwoyo wechivi
Jesu akapindura, Chikuru chipo chako
Kupinda zvimwe zvese, zvaunzwa kuneni

title: Nditoreyi Ini
lyrics:
Jesu Tenzi ndinochema, Ndofa asi m’kabatsira
O unzayi ruponeso, Nditoreyi ini

Chorus:
Nditoreyi im’! Nditoreyi ini!
Kristu wandifira ini, nditoreyi ini

Handinaka rubatsiro, Asi imwi mandifira
Mungandi’te zvamunoda, Nditoreyi ini

Hapana zvandagadzira, Zvitsidzo zvangu ndotyora
Asi ndiponeseyiwo, Nditoreyi ini

Ndiri pamakumbo enyu, Ndiiteyi sezvamunoda
Pedzisayi basa renyu, Nditoreyi Tenzi

Kuti ndibate nesimba, Ndimutsirireyi mwoyo
Ndichaita kuda kwenyu, Nditoreyi Tenzi

Kana basa razopera, Hondo yepasi yapera
Ndinozokuchemerayi, Nditoreyi Tenzi

title: Tinofara Kubatira Tenzi
lyrics:
Tinofara kubatira Tenzi, Tinobvuma kumubatira
Basa iro Tenzi anotipa, Tinoita nekutendeka

Chorus:
Tomubatira, toenda mberi
Tine rufaro, Tomubatira
Pano mumunda wake

Tinofara kuparadza shoko, Nerudo kune vanhu pasi
Jesu arikupenya kwaBaba, Anotipa zvikomborero

Nekupfava totevera Tenzi, Tinofamba nekuperera
Topangidza vamwe kuna Tenzi, Nevanyangadzi kugwayana

title: Yakafanira Nyenye
lyrics:
Yakafanira nyenye, Yakafanira nyenye;
Yakafanira nyenye, Yabaiwa

Chorus:
Mbiri, Hariruya, Kudza Hariruya!
Mbiri, Hariruya! Kunyenye.

Tenzi unza umambo! Huzopedza chitema;
Unzai makore churu, Moyera.

Nguva dzese tinonzwa, Tim’de Timusandire
Tinosvika Zioni, Tim’one

title: Mawoko Maviri
lyrics:
Ndichazo musevenzera Jesu
Ndomutenda nemuromo
Nzeve dzangu dzichazomunzwa
Ndomuimbira neinzwi

Chorus:
Tenzi tinouya,
Tinouya tiri vana
Tenzi tinouya,
Tidzidze nemi

Ndichazofamba munzira yake
Inoenda kudenga’yo
Maziso kufunda Bhaibheri
Nerudo rwake Kristu

Ndine mwoyo wekumupa Jesu
Mweya umwe aponese
Upenyu humwe murusando
Zvese zvangu ngezvakewo

title: Gogo, Gogo
lyrics:
Gogo, gogo, ndiani? Arindira akanaka!
Mufambi weumambo zve Asati awonekwa
A! mweya wangu, zaruravo mwoyo
Chishamiso chipinde’mo mukati

Gogo, gogo, Achipo, Arindira, Oshamisa
Handinyore kuzarura, zvo zvite zvakurisa
Zvadzikisa midzi yazvo, Kutenderedza
m’siwo; Kuti usazarure

Gogo, gogo, Achipo? Arindira, Akanaka
Anogogodza musiwo, nechiremba
chemhinzwa; Arindira nemutsa, Tenzi
akarindira; Woreg’ aripo here

title: Fukidzwa Neupenyu Hwake
lyrics:
Nangisa Jesu, Hana chitema;Upenyu hwake, hwapiwe’ni
Upenyu hwangu nechitema, Hwafukwa nehwake kuchena

Chorus:
Ndofukidzwa neupenyu hwake
Ndozoziva upenyu hwese
Upenyu hwangu hwechitema
Hwafukwa nehwake huchena

Zvironda zvechitema zvadzama, Zvakatsvuka, Mweya unotya
O kufukidzwa nemwi Jesu, Ndosunungurwa nemutemo

Ndoda kuziva rusununguro! Jesu ondipa nguwo chena
Ndaigashira, yangu ndarasa, Ndinopfeka upenyu hwenyu

Ndadzorerwa nerufo rwangu, Ndaruramiswa nemwi Tenzi
Ndaereswa neinzwi renyu, Ndozogashira mbiri yenyu

title: Da’Dzira Hondo
lyrics:
Da’Dzira Hondo, mhandu yapetyo, Sim’dza mureza waTenzi
Pfeka chishangu, Simbayi mese, Simbirayi painzwi rake

Chorus:
Vakani simudzayi mureza
Gadzirira, nyeweranayi
Enda mberi, Daidza Hosana!
Kristu m’tungamiri wehondo

Farayi mukumbane nemhandu, Idi rinokurirazve
Chishangu nemureza zvipenye, Tichakurira, hatitadzi

O Mwari wevese chitinzwayi, Tibatsireyi netsitsi
Hondo yazopera, takurira, Tingazopfekawo zviremba

title: Nditungamire Muponesi
lyrics:
Tenzi nditungamire, Munzira yangu yose
Ndachengetwa, ndinemwi, Ndichagara murudo

Chorus:
Tenzi, kuti ndisarasike m’nzira
Mukuchinja kwenguva, Nditungamire Tenzi

Muribako’ro rangu, Cham’pupuri chauya
Handizotyi ndinemwi, Ndinosimbira imwi

Ndisvitse kumagumo, Cham’pupuri chapera
Ndozosvika nyika’yo, Masodzi opukutwa

title: Zvakaroverwa Pamuchinjiko
lyrics:
Kwava noumwe wakafa panzwimbo yangu, Kuti mweya sowang’ upone
Wabvuma kufamba m’nzira yemuchinjiko, Kuti asunungure ini

Chorus:
Zvakaroverwa’po, Pam’chinjiko wake
O zvizhinji sey’ atakura!, Nekurwadzwa kose;
Jesu atakura, zvese zvitema zvangu

Anemutsa, rudo, nenyasha kuneni, Anochenesa mwoyo wangu
Handichina kuraswa, ngasununguka, Zvaroverwa pam’chinjiko

Ndichabatirira kuna muponesi, Ndichafara ndiri murwendo
Ndine rwiyo momwoyo nepamuromo, Zvitema zvangu zvazobviswa

title: Handichina Nechangu, Zvese Ngezvenyu
lyrics:
Inguva inorwadza, Zvakadini yeurombo
Apo ndati kuna Jesu, Zvese zvese ndezvangu
Hapana nechenyuba, Zvese zvese ndezvangu
Apo ndati kuna Jesu, Hapana nechenyuba

Asi’ ye akandiwana, Ndakam’vona pamuti
Nemwoyo wangu ukati, Zvino zvimwe ndezvangu
Nezvimwevo ndezvako, Zvino zvimwe ndezvangu
Nemwoyo wangu ukati, Nezvimwe ndezvako

Misi yose mutsa wake, Unondibatsira, wondipfavisa
Ndichiti zvangu zvova zvishoma, Zvako zvova zvizhinji
Zvangu zvava zvishoma, Wondipfavisa ndichiti
Zvako zvava zvizhinji

Rudo rwenyu rwakakwira, Nekudzama kupinda
Nyanza nedenga zvino-ka, Handichina nechangu
Zvese zvazova zvenyu, Handichina nechangu
Zvese zvazova zvenyu, Tenzi rudo rwakurira

title: Garai Makafara
lyrics:
Mwoyo yedu ngaifare, Tinogununguneyi
Kana ivo Baba vedu, Vachingotichengeta?

Chorus:
Ngatifare, ngatifare, Tinovona kupenya
Nzira yebasa yakanakisa, Kana tichifara

Apo achitungamira, Kana izvo zvitema
Zvinozotikurirazve, Jesu anotibatsira

Kana tichirega basa, Tino rwadziwa mwoyo
Mumvuri unoswedera, Kuzodzinga rufaro

O! vatsvene vanogara, Vachifarisisazve
Nzira yavo inopenya, Idayi zvakanaka

title: Zororo Ravakaneta
lyrics:
Kune musha wevatsvene, Vozorora munyika
Uko muponesi wangu, Akandigadzirira

Chorus:
Kune zororo ikoko, kunezororo ikoko
Kune zororo ikoko, ravakaneta
Pamhendero yeJordani, Nemumunda weEdeni
Panomuti weupenyu kunezororo

Andigadzirira imba, Inogara narini
Kwandichazogara hangu, Kunyika iyo itsva

Hakuzovi nekurwara, Hakunazve urombo
Asi ndicha pfekedzwazve, Chiremba cheupenyu

Hakuzovi norufu zve, Rumborera ruchabva,
Vaponeswa vachafara kuna Jesu ouya.

Imbayi vadyi venhaka, Farai muchienda
Muchazozarurirwazve, Mazambara eZioni
